title: Christmas Tree Lights 20M 200 LED Warm White, Fairy Lights Plug in,Christmas Lights Cluster Mains Powered with Memory Function and 8 Lighting Modes for Indoor/Outdoor Xmas Decorations
features: ✨ 20m Cable, 200 Warm LED: 20m cable and 200 densely packed LEDs create a dazzling lighting experience—perfect for decorating tall trees, window frames, fences, or as an impressive bedroom accent. Say goodbye to dim lighting and enjoy a beautiful, even glow.

💡 8 Lighting Modes + Convenient Memory Function: Customize your ambiance with 8 different lighting modes, including steady on, flashing, slow fade, and multiple effect combinations. The smart memory function retains your default settings, eliminating the need to switch modes each time.

✨ Soft Warm White Light: Our LED lights emit a soft, inviting warm white light (similar to traditional incandescent lamps) for a relaxing and cozy atmosphere. Perfect for relaxing in the bedroom, creating a romantic ambiance, or adding a classic, warm touch to your Christmas decor.
🔌 Convenient Ac Adapter Operation: Simply plug it into a standard UK outlet and enjoy long-lasting, bright light without the hassle of running costs or replacing batteries.

🎄 Suitable For Indoors And Outdoors: This versatile light string is weatherproof (see IP rating in the specifications). It's perfect for Christmas decorations, garden parties, weddings, or creating a magical atmosphere in your home year-round.

✅ Maximum Energy Saving - Only 6w!: This outdoor Christmas light uses just 6W of power to light up your tree, making it incredibly energy-efficient. Perfect for Long-Term Use: Use it as a nightlight or as a decoration that stays on all night. Eco-Friendly and Economical: Minimize your electricity bills so you can enjoy the magic of the holidays with peace of mind.

🛡️ Safe At Home, Ip44 Waterproof: Complete peace of mind: Ultra-low voltage power supply (31V DC). Cool and Safe Light Source: The energy-saving LED light stays cool at all times, ensuring maximum safety even during extended use. The IP44 rating makes it ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, allowing you to enjoy the magic of the holidays in complete safety.

✨ Dreamy Festive Atmosphere: Transform your home into a magical venue perfect for celebrations like Christmas, weddings, birthdays, and more. These Christmas lights add a warm glow to any room, window, balcony, or garden.

💡 Want An Even More Stunning Decoration? Connect up to three strings of lights to create a stunning effect up to 60 meters long with 600 LED lights. 60 meters of light and 600 LEDs are the perfect complement to your tree, radiating a dazzling glow and creating a dreamy atmosphere.
